<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band07_chunk006.pdf#page=21 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band07 p290 -->

SCHWINDKIRCHEN

<!-- header: CHWINDKIRCHEN -->


[[File:Band07_chunk006_p021_img001.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band07_chunk006_p021_img002.jpg|thumb|Krönung Mariens und Heiligenhimmel]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band07 p291 -->
